items.title: Imagining Neo-Emotions: Historical Perspectives
items.author: Katie BarclayHistory, 7788Macquarie University, Sydney, Australia
items.content: <article>Emotion Review, Ahead of Print. Neo-emotions are invented terms that express emotional experiences that are novel or that have not previously been labeled. This article considers the utility of the concept of neo-emotions for the study of the past, exploring concepts of novelty and ...</article>
